About Me

I am a dedicated Software Engineer with expertise in building scalable backend applications using ASP.NET Core and designing serverless event-driven architectures on AWS. With a strong foundation in C#, JavaScript, and DevOps pipelines, I focus on optimizing operational efficiency, automating workflows, and delivering high-throughput systems that align with complex enterprise requirements.
